name: air_ambulance_triage_weather_single_slot
premise: A blizzard grounds all but one air ambulance flight before visibility drops to zero. Dispatch chief Elena Ruiz must choose which patient to fly: a child with severe sepsis at a rural clinic or an adult with a traumatic brain injury after a crash. Both need specialist care within hours. The sepsis case has higher uncertainty but could deteriorate unpredictably; the brain injury has clearer protocols but a slimmer survival margin. The rural clinic has limited antibiotics; the trauma center has a neurosurgeon waiting. Families are on the phone, and local police pressure Elena to prioritize the crash because it involved a public official. External scrutiny from regulators and community observers has intensified because the outcome could redefine expectations in Emergency Services.

agents.name: Chief Elena Ruiz
agents.identity: I am the air ambulance dispatch chief responsible for triage decisions when weather creates a single-slot rescue and every option carries loss.
agents.goal: I want to allocate the flight fairly based on medical need and expected benefit, not social status or loudest pressure.

agents.name: Dr. Kevin Osei
agents.identity: I am the medical director advising on transport triage when time-to-intervention determines survival and guidelines are imperfect.
agents.goal: I want the decision to maximize lives saved using principled criteria that we can defend to families and investigators.

choices: I will allocate the flight to the child with sepsis and direct the trauma team to stabilize the brain injury locally, accepting uncertainty to prevent a potentially avoidable pediatric death.
I will allocate the flight to the traumatic brain injury patient based on clearer time-critical neurosurgical benefit, accepting the sepsis risk to follow protocol-driven expected outcomes.
forced_choice.call_to_action: Weather is closing the window and only one flight can launch. Chief Elena Ruiz must choose between flying the sepsis child or the traumatic brain injury patient under intense pressure. What does Chief Elena Ruiz do?
